case_title: INNOCENT OKORONKWO VS. EDUARDO PANIAGUA ET AL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-12-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-12-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-12-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF A MINOR---BLESSING OKORONKWO WAS NOT PRESENT BUT WAS REPRESENTED BY INNOCENT OKORONKWO (GUARDIAN AD LITEM). DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT ELENA ASTURIAS WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OKORONKWO, INNOCENT (GUARDIAN AD LITEM) SUING ON BEHALF OF MINOR BLESSING OKORONKWO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT PANIAGUA, EDUARDO ASTURIAS, ELENA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ORDER ON APPLICATION FOR APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM. THE COURT ORDERS THAT INNOCENT OKORONKWO IS HEREBY APPOINTED AS THE GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR:BLESSING OKORONKWO.
